HGSS.677.0001:
I’d love to do some more battle
preparation and review with you...\f
That’s it!
How about exchanging phone numbers\r
with me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.677.0002:
All right, I’m looking forward to talking
to you again. I’ll be sure to give you a\r
call if anything comes up!
HGSS.677.0003:
Hey, you should listen when Teachers
are talking to you!
HGSS.677.0004:
Did you change your mind about
exchanging phone numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.677.0005:
You know, I’m pretty sure I just
caught a glimpse of you...\f
If you’re nearby, you shouldn’t talk
over the phone. You should talk\r
to me in person.
HGSS.677.0006:
Hey!\f
You got yet another zero on a test!
You don’t pay attention to anything\r
I’m saying in class, do you?\r
Do you honestly think you can beat a\r
Gym Leader with that kind of...\f
Huh?\f
You’re not Travis...\f
Oh my goodness! I’m so sorry!
HGSS.677.0007:
You know, I usually use [0100,000A,0000].\f
Don’t you enjoy battling using your
best-loved Pokémon?\f
But it gets kind of lonely to just keep
using the same Pokémon over and over.\f
Sometimes I like to walk along with
Pokémon that I’ve just caught.\f
That can also be a lot of fun, you know?
HGSS.677.0008:
The other day, I was battling
[0100,000B,0000] on Route 15. People\r
stopped to watch, and soon there was\r
this huge crowd gathered!\r
I got so nervous...\f
You know, I’m used to talking in front
of a class of kids...\r
but Pokémon battles are something else.\f
I just can’t get comfortable battling in
front of a crowd!
HGSS.677.0009:
You know...
This is just between us, right?\f
The other day, I was trying to catch a
[0100,000B,0000].\f
I made a mistake and accidentally
threw out the wrong Poké Ball, and the\r
Pokémon got away.\f
It’s a good thing none of my students
were watching. But still, I was really\r
embarrassed.
HGSS.677.0010:
By the way, you’d like to prepare for
Pokémon battles and do some review,\r
wouldn’t you?\f
We should have another Pokémon battle!\f
I’m always on [0104,0003,0000].
I’ll be waiting for you there!
HGSS.677.0011:
Hey! Do you remember you made plans
with me?\f
We said we were going to meet on
[0104,0003,0000] and have a Pokémon\r
battle, right? Don’t forget!
HGSS.677.0012:
That’s right... If you ask me which is
cuter, my students or Pokémon,\r
I’ll have a hard time making\r
that decision.\f
Come to think of it, for a lot of kids,
their first Pokémon is the cutest one in\r
the world in their young eyes.\f
And there’s nothing that can be said to
change that opinion.
